Package com.saperion.rmi

Class SaRMIEventFilter

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.rmi.SaRMIEventFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
SaEventFilter, Serializable
public class SaRMIEventFilter extends Object implements SaEventFilter
Defines the event filters. The filter means that an event will be fired only for specified documents from the backend. The ddc name, event type (1..3)and an array of the filters form the event filter.
Author:
rbo
